titleStmt.title: SII 6.132: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 132. (A.R. No. 171 of 1897). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīramaṇu(ṁ) ḍa¨rtthi ṁḍu voṟaṁḍūrivibhuṁḍu gaśyapagōtrōddhāru(ṁ)ḍanaṁ bara
ge nīlasarasīruhasaṁbhbhavakuluṁḍu śivadēvu(ṁ)ḍananu . [Ā]tanikiṁ buṇyamū¨rttiki nātataguṇanidhi
ki guṁḍamāṁbaku dha¨rmmōpētu(ṁ)ḍu satyanityanikētanuṁḍai puṭṭe maṁtrikēta(ṁ)ḍu vē¨rmmini . Atani
ki(ṁ) brītu(ṁ)ḍai muddamāṁbaku(ṁ) buṭṭe namātyavidda(ṁ) ḍū¨rjitanayaśāli yītaniki siṁdhuragāmini dōnamā
ṁbakunu hitamitabhāṣi gēta(ṁ) ḍudiyiṁcce samastajanānurāgu(ṁ)ḍai śatamakhabhōgi vāni Anujanmu(ṁ)ḍu
viddanamalla(ṁ)ḍunnatini . śrīśakava¨rṣamuluThelu is cut below the line.1073 gunēṁṭi Uttarāyanasaṁkrāṁtti nimittamuna śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara tribhuvanamalladēva pottappicōḍamahārājula rājādhyakṣa viddanapeggaḍa koḍku mallayapeggaḍa
kammanāṁṭilōni prēṁpalli śrībhāvanārāyaṇadēvara kācaṁdrā¨rkka makhaṁḍava¨rtti dīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina biru
dumāḍalu 12 . vīniṁ jēkoni māreni kāmarāju koḍuku dēvana tana putrānupauvitrikamu nitya māne
ṁḍu neyi pōyaṁgalavāṁḍu .
Digital edition of SII 6.132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
